description_long: This is a sleek, modern electric SUV with a streamlined body painted in a light blue color. The car features a panoramic glass roof, large alloy wheels, and flush door handles that enhance its aerodynamic profile. The front grille is minimalistic with a mesh pattern, flanked by sharp, angular LED headlights. The rear of the vehicle is characterized by a continuous LED tail light strip and a subtle integrated spoiler. The interior, visible through the windows, appears to be spacious with light-colored seats and a digital dashboard. The overall design suggests a luxury vehicle with advanced technology and comfort features.
description: A light blue, modern electric SUV with a panoramic glass roof, angular LED lights, and a streamlined, luxury design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mesh grille, angular LED headlights, and panoramic glass roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the flush door handles, large alloy wheels, and sleek body lines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous LED tail light strip, integrated spoiler, and rear window.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the aerodynamic profile and wheel design.
attribute_headlight_design: Dual angular LED headlights with integrated LED strips
